positive: A mystical, stylized forest clearing scene featuring a majestic, crowned stag standing in a pose of regal alertness. The stag should be rendered with highly detailed, intricate fur textures and strong, dramatic silhouettes against a backdrop of bioluminescent foliage and swirling magical mist. Use a sophisticated 'neo-medieval fantasy' illustration style, with deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted by luminous gold accents. The composition must be central and symmetrical, designed for a wearable art print, emphasizing clean lines and high contrast. Golden hour lighting filtering through the canopy, creating strong rim lighting around the stag and the edges of the forest elements. Vector illustration quality, highly detailed digital painting, perfect symmetry, high contrast, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blurry, ugly, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, mutation, extra limbs, poorly drawn, poor composition, grayscale, photorealism
